title: Verify Happy Path: User sets a reminder via Trial Corner
description: Test that a user in the target cohort sees the homepage widget, navigates to the Trial Corner, and successfully enables the 'Remind me' toggle.
preconditions: User has not consumed any content within the first 5 minutes of the trial.
User is on Day 0 or Day 1 of the trial.

steps.description: 1. Log in as the user and land on the homepage.
2. Observe the persistent 'Trial Mode' widget in the header.
4. Verify redirection to the 'Trial Corner' hub.
6. Click the toggle for 'Remind me 24h before trial ends'.

expected_result: The user successfully sets a reminder. The toggle state is saved, and a 'remind-me-clicked' event is triggered with 'trial corner' as the page source.
